name: R-9 registry includes the color.legacy.red deprecated token replaced_by color.signal.danger as a worked example
command: node -e 'const y=require("fs").readFileSync(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/design-tokens/registry.yaml","utf8");const blocks=y.split(/^  - id: /m).slice(1);const legacy=blocks.find(b=>b.startsWith("color.legacy.red"));process.exit(legacy&&/deprecated: true/.test(legacy)&&/replaced_by: color\.signal\.danger/.test(legacy)?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
